evals.prompt: I have a selected Figma frame and need to implement it in our React app without guessing tokens.
evals.expected_output: Routes first to figma-context-reader, then figma-design-to-code-bridge and a frontend specialist; requires Figma context evidence and local validation.

evals.prompt: Prod is ahead of Figma. Bring this local page back into editable Figma layers.
evals.expected_output: Routes to figma-code-to-canvas, checks live URL/privacy/tool availability, and avoids promising success without MCP evidence.

evals.prompt: Add glass and noise effects to these selected cards using tokens if possible.
evals.expected_output: Routes to figma-apply-effects, distinguishes supported variable bindings from runtime-gated extended effects, and requires readback.
